whitelist.message: You're not on the playtest whitelist. DM the creator on Discord if it is a mistake!

defaultMessages.unknownVersion: This version is deprecated. Grab the latest playtest build from the Discord.
defaultMessages.inactive: This build isn't active. Check the Discord for the current build.
defaultMessages.notStarted: The playtest hasn't started yet - hang tight!
defaultMessages.expired: This playtest build has ended. Grab the newest build from the Discord.
